title: Junior Frontend Developer at Accenture India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Accenture India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Accenture India Global Group are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Accenture India Global Group:
Accenture India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India Global Group!
